  Thanks for contributing to OlliteRT!
  Please, DO NOT DELETE ANY TEXT from this template (unless instructed).

### Breaking change
<!--
  If your PR contains a breaking change for existing users, describe what
  breaks, how to make it work again, and why the change was necessary.
  Note: Remove this section if this PR is NOT a breaking change.
-->


### Proposed change
<!--
  Describe the big picture of your changes here to communicate to the
  maintainers why we should accept this pull request.
-->


### Screenshots
<!--
  If your PR includes visual changes, please add screenshots or a short video
  showing the before and after.
  Note: Remove this section if this PR has no visual changes.
-->


### Type of change
<!--
  What type of change does your PR introduce?
  Please check only 1 box. If multiple apply, consider splitting into
  separate PRs — it makes review faster.
-->

- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change (fix/feature causing existing functionality to break)
- [ ] Code quality improvements or tests
- [ ] Dependency upgrade
- [ ] Documentation

### Additional information
<!--
  Details help maintainers process your PR. Fill in what applies.
-->

- This PR fixes or closes issue: fixes #
- This PR is related to issue:

### Checklist
<!--
  Put an x in the boxes that apply. If you're unsure about any of them,
  don't hesitate to ask.
-->

- [ ] The code compiles without errors (`./gradlew :app:compileStableDebugKotlin`)
- [ ] The change is tested and works locally on a real device or emulator
- [ ] No new warnings from `./gradlew lint`
- [ ] There is no commented out code in this PR
- [ ] Existing functionality is not broken
